notes: Low-salt elution buffers can be pre-aliquoted for same-day or same-week use.
Batching is allowed only for identical primer sets; engine or UI should require user confirmation if target sets differ.
PCR-grade water can be staged once across compatible PCR tasks.
Fresh wash ethanol is a strong shared-prep candidate; handoff warns that >500 mL in one prep is weird, so cap at 500 mL.
Elution-grade water can be batched across cleanup workflows.
Buffered elution solutions can be batched if downstream application tolerates the same formulation.
